news.headline: Pending home sales rose by 2% in February. NAR projects a 6.4% average mortgage rate, 6% increase in existing-home sales, 10% rise in new-home sales, and 3% growth in national median home price for 2025.
news.summary: According to the latest forecast by the NAR, mortgage rates are expected to average 6.4% in 2025. Existing-home sales are projected to see a 6% increase, while new-home sales are forecasted to improve by 10%. Additionally, the national median home price is anticipated to rise by 3% in the same year.

news.headline: PetSmart to announce Q4 and FY 2024 results on Apr 2, 2025. Conference call and webcast to be held.
news.summary: PetSmart LLC is set to release its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on April 2, 2025, via its secure website. This Arizona-based company will also conduct a conference call and webcast to discuss the results. Stay tuned for updates on this forthcoming report.

news.headline: Holiday Inn Club Vacations wins 14 ARDA Awards, including ACE Award; a top honor in the industry.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made on March 27, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, Holiday Inn Club Vacations Incorporated, a global vacation ownership firm, revealed its success in claiming a total of 14 accolades from the American Resort Development Association (ARDA). These awards notably consist of the esteemed ARDA Circle of Excellence (ACE) Emerging award.

news.headline: Flashnet expands to USA with Flashnet LLC to lead smart street lighting market. Operating in North America.
news.summary: In Brasov, Romania, on March 27, 2025, Flashnet, a key player in the worldwide smart street lighting sector, has broadened its presence in the United States through the introduction of Flashnet LLC. This move strengthens the company’s operations and showcases its commitment to growth in the market.

news.headline: Key colorectal clinical trial will use LifeTracDx blood test by Creatv Bio in collaboration with CytoDyn Corp. FDA approved.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Monmouth Junction, New Jersey, Creatv Bio, a Division of Creatv MicroTech, Inc., announced a collaboration with CytoDyn Therapeutics Corporation to evaluate patient response to their drug through the LifeTracDx® blood test. CytoDyn, in partnership with Creatv, will leverage this test to assess the efficacy of their drug, following FDA approval for the initiative.

news.headline: ERA Real Estate invests in baseball advertising for spring season, aiming to fulfill homeownership dreams.
news.summary: ERA Real Estate, a prominent franchising leader under Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS), has initiated a nationwide media campaign during Major League Baseball and Minor League Baseball games. The campaign, launched on March 27, 2025, aims to boost brand recognition and engagement on a larger scale. By tapping into these popular sporting events, ERA Real Estate intends to reach a broader audience and capitalize on the significant viewership numbers associated with baseball games. This strategic move aligns with the brand's commitment to expanding its reach and presence across diverse platforms.

news.headline: Global urology device market report identifies key trends boosting outpatient growth and disposable device adoption in medical device industry.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 27, 2025, a recently released Global Urological Device Market Report provides essential information for executives such as CEOs, CFOs, and managers in the medical device sector. This report assists in recognizing revenue opportunities, managing risks, and developing strategic responses. It offers crucial insights into the urological device market, aiding professionals in making informed decisions.

news.headline: Hakluyt adds Ronald Sugar, Uber chairman, to International Advisory Board. Sugar also serves as director of Apple.
news.summary: In London on March 27, 2025, Hakluyt, a renowned global strategic advisory firm catering to businesses and investors, revealed the addition of Ronald Sugar to its international advisory board. Sugar, who currently serves as the chairman of the board at Uber and holds a directorial position at Apple, brings valuable expertise to the team. With a background in engineering, Dr. Sugar's appointment signifies a strategic move aimed at leveraging his extensive experience within the tech industry.

news.headline: France’s President Macron: We'll help all sectors hit by US tariffs.
Michelle Fermin from Century 21 North East in Lawrence, Massachusetts inducted into Century 21 Dick Loughlin International Hall of Fame.
news.summary: In Madison, New Jersey on March 27, 2025, Century 21 Real Estate LLC, a part of Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS), shared news at the Top Agent Retreat in Anaheim that Michelle Fermin from CENTURY 21 North East in Lawrence, MA, was honored with a prestigious award.

news.headline: US Pending Homes Index Actual 72.0 (Forecast -, Previous 70.6)
US Marine Corps partners with Workera AI platform to improve workforce skills assessment. Major development in analyst training.
news.summary: A strategic collaboration has been revealed between Workera, a prominent AI-powered skills intelligence platform based in Palo Alto, California, and the United States Marine Corps on March 27, 2025. This alliance is centered around the implementation of an Advanced AI Skills Assessment tool, aimed at enhancing precision in the development of professional analysts. Through this partnership, crucial skills development data will be utilized to propel analyst training forward. This initiative showcases the increasing reliance on technology in honing the talents of professionals, with numbers of participants and impact metrics expected to significantly grow in the near future.

news.headline: J.P. Morgan Asset Management launches JPMorgan Nasdaq Hedged Equity Laddered Overlay ETF (HEQQ) on Nasdaq Stock Market.
news.summary: A fund has partnered with HELO in the company's Hedged Equity collection. The collaboration was unveiled by J.P. Morgan Asset Management in New York on March 27, 2025. The recently launched JPMorgan Nasdaq Hedged Equity Laddered Overlay ETF (HEQQ) is now available on the Nasdaq Stock Market. This collaborative effort aims to strategically enhance the firm's offerings in the market.

news.headline: Integrity Marketing Group acquires The Quantum Group to enhance holistic retirement planning with life & annuity sales platform.
news.summary: Integrity Marketing Group, LLC ("Integrity"), a prominent distributor of life and annuity products, has recently integrated The Quantum Group's top-rated sales platform into its services. This merger aims to expand annuity solutions for a larger number of Americans, enriching their retirement planning with a holistic approach. The collaboration, effective as of March 27, 2025, seeks to enhance Integrity's offerings and cater to a broader clientele by leveraging The Quantum Group's cutting-edge life and annuity sales platform.

news.headline: hireEZ debuts Agentic AI for innovative recruitment:AI-First, People-Centric Platform enhances automation and intelligence.
news.summary: Today in Mountain View, California, hireEZ, a platform that prioritizes AI and focuses on people, announced the launch of Agentic AI. This innovation in recruitment automation aims to empower recruiters with adaptive intelligence and scalable automation. The introduction took place on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: TCab Tech secures B+ round funding to commercialize E20 eVTOL, co-led by Grand Neo Bay VC and Chiforturne VC.
news.summary: Today, TCab Tech, a leading developer of electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft, disclosed the accomplishment of their recent B+ round financing on March 27, 2025. This funding round was successfully closed with significant contributions from Grand Neo Bay Venture Capital and Chiforturne Venture. The exact amount raised in this round has not been provided, but it is expected to be a substantial figure crucial for advancing TCab Tech's innovative eVTOL projects.

news.headline: France suggests adjusting EU carbon market for stability, aiming to enhance its performance.
Holcim US wins NRMCA Concrete Innovations Award for carbon reduction strategies using ECOPact low carbon concrete in interstate studies.
news.summary: Holcim US, a prominent provider of sustainable building solutions, has been recognized for its utilization of ECOPact™ low carbon concrete in the study of concrete pavement by the National Road Research Alliance. This initiative aims to deepen the understanding of low-carbon material performance on interstates. The achievement was announced in Chicago on March 27, 2025. The company's efforts in this area have led to its recognition as a recipient of an award from the NRMCA.

news.headline: Las Vegas Raiders partner with Coupa to enhance spend management, aiming to drive efficiency and growth.
news.summary: The Las Vegas Raiders have selected Coupa's top total spend management platform to enhance spend optimization, boost efficiency, and drive business growth. The announcement was made on March 27, 2025, in Foster City, California. Coupa, a prominent total spend management platform, revealed its partnership with the Raiders to achieve these objectives.

news.headline: Consumer demand for data is rising, leading to a spectrum shortfall that may cost the US $1.4T and jeopardize network functionality.
news.summary: The rising consumer demand for wireless data has surged exponentially, leading to a pressing need for additional spectrum in U.S. wireless networks to uphold service quality. As of March 27, 2025, sources confirm that without acquiring more full-powered midband spectrum, the current wireless infrastructure will struggle to manage the escalating demand, potentially resulting in service disruptions. To address this issue, an urgent requirement for boosting network capacity and performance is prevalent.

news.headline: Viamericas launches payment network in Philippines, key player in money transfer services.
news.summary: A provider of remittance and international money transfer services, Viamericas, has recently introduced its open payment network in the Philippines. Based in Coral Gables, Florida, the company's expansion into the country aims to enhance its services to customers by offering a wider range of options for transferring funds internationally. The move signifies Viamericas' commitment to providing efficient and accessible money transfer solutions to its clients.

news.headline: Cardinality.ai partners with Underdog Dreams for new program training individuals for tech careers. GAITHERSBURG, Md., March 27, 2025.
news.summary: Cardinality.ai, a data technology company based in Gaithersburg, Maryland, has partnered with Underdog Dreams to introduce a new program aimed at guiding individuals towards opportunities in the tech industry. The collaboration, announced on March 27, 2025, seeks to provide support and assistance to those looking to pursue careers in technology. Cardinality.ai specializes in utilizing AI to improve results for government agencies. This initiative aims to leverage their expertise to equip individuals with the necessary skills and knowledge to succeed in the tech sector. The partnership between Cardinality.ai and Underdog Dreams underscores their commitment to empowering aspiring tech professionals.

news.headline: Archetype AI launches Lenses with Partners Kajima, City of Bellevue, and Khasm Labs, using Newton™, for business solutions.
news.summary: A new startup based in Palo Alto, California called Archetype AI has unveiled a groundbreaking innovation in the form of Lenses, a unique AI application aimed at addressing intricate problems in the real world. These cutting-edge Lenses leverage the Newton™ foundation model developed by Archetype to help various industries, such as consumer electronics, construction, and manufacturing, convert raw sensor data into personalized and practical solutions. Archetype AI is leading the way in the emerging field of Physical AI, offering businesses the tools they need to navigate complex challenges efficiently.

news.headline: State and local governments in the U.S. are reconsidering mainframes in light of AI, with firms such as ISG advising on reengineering and cloud migration.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, State and local governments across the United States are reassessing their mainframe systems, according to ISG. They are facing decisions on whether to reengineer their current systems or migrate to the cloud. This move comes as organizations look for ways to modernize their IT infrastructure. The shift indicates a growing trend towards adapting newer technologies, with a focus on efficiency and cost-effectiveness.

news.headline: FutureDial and SB Frameworks join forces to automate mobile refurbishment in Japan, a partnership spanning multiple years.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between FutureDial, a top company in connected device data sanitization, functional testing, and refurbishment automation based in Sunnyvale, California, and SB Frameworks Japan, a subsidiary of SoftBank. This collaboration is set to span multiple years and marks a significant development in the industry. The partnership will focus on leveraging the expertise of both companies to enhance their offerings in the market. This agreement between FutureDial and SB Frameworks Japan is expected to bring innovation to the sector and benefit customers worldwide.

news.headline: France’s President Macron on Trump tariffs: We will work with EU on looking at how to protect sectors.
US Pending Home Sales Change MoM Actual 2% (Forecast 1%, Previous -4.6%)
LaVoie Strategic Communications Group awarded $4 million GSA contract to offer PR, marketing, and training to federal agencies.
news.summary: LaVoie Strategic Communications Group, also known as LaVoieHealthScience, has secured a five-year extension of their twenty-year General Services Administration (GSA) Multiple Award Schedule (MAS) contract (Contract Number 47QRAA25D0070). This contract allows them to offer public relations, marketing, and leadership training services to the Federal Government. The extension is valued at approximately $4 million.

news.headline: Vantage DC to host inaugural Safety Summit on April 29 in Ohio; aimed at industry leaders to promote elite safety culture.
news.summary: Vantage Data Centers, a prominent provider of hyperscale data center campuses, has revealed plans for its inaugural safety summit aimed at uniting industry leaders, safety experts, and key stakeholders to explore top practices, advancements, and methods for fostering a top-tier safety environment. The Vantage Data Centers Safety Summit 2025, slated to take place in Columbus, Ohio on April 29, will be a full-day event centered around the theme "Partnering for an Elite Safety Culture." This summit marks a pivotal step in promoting safety with contributions from various professionals and organizations.

news.headline: NaphCare introduces MyCare Patient Portal for inmates, offering 24/7 access to health info via digital tablets.
news.summary: Headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama, NaphCare, Inc., a prominent correctional healthcare firm, has introduced the MyCare Patient Portal. This innovative platform aims to enhance healthcare access by offering patients round-the-clock visibility into their personal health data. Operating through digital tablets within correctional facilities, MyCare facilitates direct communication between patients and healthcare personnel. It also grants access to medical records, such as test outcomes, prescription information, upcoming appointments, and patient education resources.

news.headline: BP is selling its mobility business in Austria including over 260 retail sites, aiming to complete the sale by end of 2025.
news.summary: BP p.l.c. (NYSE:BP) announced its intention to sell its mobility and convenience business in Austria, which includes over 260 retail sites (approximately 120 owned by the company), along with Austrian fleet business and EV charging assets. The sale also encompasses BP's stake in the non-operated joint venture managing the Linz fuel terminal. The sale process will begin promptly, with the goal of finalizing it by the end of 2025, subject to regulatory approvals. This decision comes as part of BP's strategy to enhance its downstream operations, aligning with the previous move to sell its mobility and convenience business in the Netherlands. Emma Delaney, EVP of customers & products at bp, highlighted the company's growth in recent years.

news.headline: Macron on Trump Tariffs: Europeans will respond by reciprocating.
President threatens "large scale" tariffs if Canada, EU ally against US, in late-night post.
news.summary: The president issued a statement on social media during the late hours, indicating plans to implement significant tariffs if Canada and the European Union collaborated to inflict economic damage on the United States.

news.headline: Mexico's President Sheinbaum: We'll give an 'integral' response to the US April 3.
Deep Fission appoints Rani Franovich as VP of Regulatory Affairs for underground reactors, enhancing licensing strategy. #NuclearEnergy
news.summary: Deep Fission Inc. (Deep Fission), a nuclear energy company based in Berkeley, California, has appointed Rani Franovich as Vice President of Regulatory Affairs. Franovich is known for her expertise in nuclear oversight and licensing and has extensive regulatory experience. Deep Fission is known for its innovative approach of placing small modular reactors (SMRs) underground. The company's vision is to commercialize deep geologic nuclear power, aiming for a safer and faster process. Franovich's appointment comes at a crucial time as the company works towards achieving this goal.

news.headline: Allies concerned over Trump's policies as new auto tariffs strain relations, raising doubts about U.S. reliability.
news.summary: The latest automotive tariffs are causing tension with U.S. allies and raising concerns about America's dependability as a partner.

news.headline: Cool Company Ltd. authorizes 205,871 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) for 2025, equal to 0.38% of share capital.
news.summary: In London, the Company's board of directors has approved the issuance of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) for 2025 under the Long-Term Incentive Program. A total of 205,871 RSUs will be granted to employees and management, representing around 0.38% of the company's share capital. These RSUs will convert into company shares as per the LTIP guidelines.

news.headline: Capstone Green Energy gets 2MW Microturbine order for midstream expansion from repeat customer.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc. (CGEH) and Capstone Green Energy, LLC. revealed that Horizon Power Systems received a new order from a loyal client for two Capstone C1000S microturbines. These units, commissioned for midstream compressor stations in the Permian Basin, will serve as the main power source. This move showcases the client's commitment to utilizing Capstone's eco-friendly and effective energy solutions.

news.headline: XRP advocate John Deaton, unsuccessful in unseating Elizabeth Warren, eyes another Senate run to broaden his reach.
news.summary: Deaton aims to enhance his public image outside the crypto community as he contemplates running for a Senate seat for the second time.

news.headline: Trade worries overshadow positive economic news, causing stocks to decline. Market update.
CZ charges $125 in BNB for messages on ReachMe, aiming for a sweet spot of 10 messages/day after being spammed.
news.summary: CZ mentioned his intention to set the price at a level that achieves around 10 messages per day after previously increasing the fee due to being spammed.

news.headline: BIT Mining reported February 2025 production with 42.56 BTC mined, 2,013,292.9 DOGE, and 556.7 LTC. Total exahash capacity: 2,588PH/s. CEO mentioned improved efficiency, cost reduction, and profitability in mining Litecoin and Dogecoin.
news.summary: BIT Mining Limited reported its February 2025 mining production, generating a total of 42.56 Bitcoin (BTC), with 36.854 BTC for clients and 5.708 BTC self-mined. Additionally, the company produced 2,013,292.9 Dogecoin (DOGE) and 556.7 Litecoin (LTC), with a total exahash capacity of 2,588PH/s. The average days per self-mined BTC was 4.5 days, and the cost per BTC mined was $60,960. CEO Xianfeng Yang highlighted the company's productive month, emphasizing efficiency improvements and cost reductions through proprietary mining machines, showing profitability in mining Litecoin and Dogecoin to diversify revenue streams.

news.headline: GameStop's stock is dropping as it plans a private offering of $1.3 billion convertible senior notes due 2030.
news.summary: Shares of GameStop Corp (NYSE:GME) are declining as the company revealed a proposed private offering. GameStop is planning to offer $1.3 billion worth of its 0.00% convertible senior notes due 2030 to institutional investors. The company is also allowing initial purchasers a 13-day window to acquire up to an additional $200 million of the notes. GameStop stated that the net proceeds from the offering will be used for general corporate needs and potential purchases.

news.headline: US crypto policy updates: Tax benefits, dropped SEC cases, Bitcoin Reserve strategies unfold. Reg shifts and legal challenges shape industry's future.
news.summary: The article discusses the shifting landscape of cryptocurrency regulation in the US, highlighting the recent settlement or dropping of high-profile lawsuits against companies like Coinbase, Consensys, Binance, and Tron. Under the Trump administration, the SEC is experiencing significant changes in leadership, leading to a new approach towards enforcement actions. The importance of legal professionals in enabling innovation and ensuring compliance in the crypto industry is emphasized, with a focus on integrity within the legal community. The need for staying informed in the face of rapid regulatory developments, policy proposals, and legal battles is stressed, particularly in light of recent industry events like the Libra memecoin scandal and the Bitcoin reserve proposal. Industry participants are urged to remain vigilant as the US considers regulatory reforms and potential institutional adoption of Bitcoin. Listening to The Clear Crypto Podcast is recommended for more in-depth insights on crypto regulation and industry developments.

news.headline: Tetra Tech (TTEK) buys Carron + Walsh, a European consulting firm, for large-scale infrastructure projects in Europe.
news.summary: Tetra Tech, Inc., a renowned provider of consulting and engineering services specializing in water, environment, and sustainable infrastructure, recently disclosed its acquisition of the Irish management consulting company, Carron + Walsh. The acquisition provides Tetra Tech access to Carron + Walsh's expertise in offering project and cost management solutions for extensive commercial, life sciences, residential, and infrastructure projects throughout Europe. Carron + Walsh operates from their main office in the Republic of Ireland. Tetra Tech's acquisition of Carron + Walsh is a strategic move to broaden their service offerings and geographic reach within the European market, solidifying their position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Freepik brings genAI-powered design tools to San Francisco with Upscale Conf on May 20-21 at SF Jazz, after success in Malaga.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Freepik, a leading company in genAI-powered creative design tools, announced their upcoming Upscale Conf in San Francisco on May 20th and 21st at SF Jazz. The event follows a successful conference in Malaga the previous year and is expected to attract a global audience of creative professionals. This year's conference will delve into innovative topics and cutting-edge technologies in the design industry, building on the momentum from the previous event.

news.headline: Rupert Resources closes $51.75M equity financing with 11.5M common shares at $4.50 each.
news.summary: Rupert Resources Ltd. has successfully completed a public offering of 11,500,000 common shares at $4.50 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of $51,750,000. This offering included the full exercise of the Underwriters' over-allotment option. The transaction was handled by Cormark S. The company, listed as TSX:RUP, is pleased to have finalized this deal.

news.headline: Successful NEXUS Olympia event on Feb 25, 2025, brought together ImageSource and WA state leaders to discuss process innovation with focus on AI, CIO Bill Kehoe's remarks highlighted this.
news.summary: ImageSource, Inc., a prominent provider of intelligent information management solutions, recently hosted the NEXUS Olympia event on February 25, 2025, in Olympia, Wash. This successful gathering witnessed the convergence of Washington state public-sector leaders and ImageSource technology experts to delve into cutting-edge innovations and strategies for process enhancement. At the event, Bill Kehoe, the Washington State CIO, delivered opening remarks highlighting the significant impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on public-sector technology.

news.headline: BlackRock's European Bitcoin ETP launch aims for institutional adoption in Europe, despite lower inflow expectations than its US counterpart.
news.summary: BlackRock's new European Bitcoin ETP began trading on Xetra, Euronext Amsterdam, and Euronext Paris. Analysts believe it might not see the same success as the US-based iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF due to lower demand. Despite this, BlackRock's reputation and expertise could boost European adoption. In the US, institutional adoption of Bitcoin ETFs has surged to over 27%. BlackRock's US spot Bitcoin ETF briefly reached $58 billion, becoming the world's 31st-largest ETF. The European Bitcoin ETP market may grow over time as regulatory clarity improves.

news.headline: Chord raises $5.5M for AI-driven CDP, helping companies boost marketing efficiency & revenue.
news.summary: Chord Commerce, a Customer Data Platform for commerce, has secured $5.5 million in funding to enhance its AI-driven data platform. This technology has significantly improved marketing efficiency and revenue for companies like Ruggable, Sakara, Sonos, and Caraway. The investment will allow Chord to further develop its innovative platform to provide tailored solutions to help businesses optimize their marketing strategies.
